summary: Renamed the React/Vite adapter and frontend live contract to scion-ops-web-app naming, including schema versions, health metadata, runtime liveService shape, source kind, read-only errors, package/title text, and operator-console wording. Renamed fixture data to local-fixtures.json and kept it explicitly marked as local fixture fallback data. Added adapter static asset coverage while preserving health, snapshot, SSE, and read-only mutation rejection tests. Branch pushed to origin at 974e113f1e57.
tasks_completed: Rename production-facing schema, runtime, service, health, and diagnostic metadata to remove preview/evaluation naming.
Keep fixture data and fixture mode available only as explicit local development and test fallback paths.
